name: idea_ai_01_4h_2state_no_session
rationale: idea_16 base (best performer 43.6%) but remove session filter to get more trades and more WF coverage across all hours

name: idea_ai_02_4h_2state_trailing
rationale: idea_16 base + trailing stop on trend to lock in gains during the strong 4H bear/bull runs instead of relying purely on regime flip exit

name: idea_ai_03_4h_2state_trend_only
rationale: idea_16 base but disable range and volatile sub-strategies; focus only on trend entries which are the cleanest signal in a 2-state regime

name: idea_ai_04_4h_2state_high_conf
rationale: idea_16 base + tighter confidence gate to only enter on very clear regime signals; trades fewer but potentially higher quality across WF windows

name: idea_ai_05_4h_2state_tight_trail
rationale: Tight trailing on trend-only, 4H 2-state: capture the move fast then protect with tight trail; no range/volatile noise

name: idea_ai_06_4h_2state_london_only
rationale: idea_16 base restricted to London session (7-16 UTC) where XAUUSD has highest liquidity and trend continuation; gold is most directional during EU hours

name: idea_ai_07_4h_2state_cdc
rationale: idea_16 base + enable CDC Action Zone sub-strategy to add EMA-crossover-based entries on top of the 4H regime; diversifies signal source

name: idea_ai_08_4h_2state_low_persist
rationale: idea_16 base with faster regime reaction (persistence=1); the 4H 2-state model is already selective, so less persistence means more trades and better WF coverage in ranging periods

name: idea_ai_09_4h_2state_wider_stops
rationale: idea_16 base with wider stops and larger TP multiple to survive larger intrabar swings on 4H-regime trades; ride the macro move further

name: idea_ai_10_4h_2state_moderate_sizing
rationale: idea_16 with slightly reduced sizing (1.8x max vs 2.0x, 80% alloc vs 90%) to improve WF robustness; the base is overfit to big sizing on the test period

name: idea_ai_11_4h_2state_trail_no_session
rationale: Combine idea_ai_01 (no session) + idea_ai_02 (trailing): maximum trades, protected by trailing stop on trend sub-strategy

name: idea_ai_12_4h_2state_trend_trail_london
rationale: Best combo: 4H 2-state + trend-only + London session + trailing; high-quality entries only with downside protection

name: idea_ai_13_4h_2state_no_sess_trend_only
rationale: idea_16 + trend-only + no session: maximum trend trades 24h, no noise from range/volatile sub-strategies

name: idea_ai_14_4h_2state_conf55_trend_trail
rationale: Moderate confidence gate (0.55) + trend-only + soft trailing: balance between trade quality and quantity, protect winners

name: idea_ai_15_4h_2state_bos_wide_trail
rationale: BOS/CHoCH confirmation on trend entries (LuxAlgo) + wide trailing: only enter after structural break, then ride with a loose trail; highest quality, fewer trades
